title: Tweaked Pale Garden
description: Modified Pale Garden textures as I thought they could use some tweaks
body:
I gave some of the blocks in the pale garden more detail cause I thought they needed a bit more

I made it for 24w40a but it should work in future snapshots

The stripped log texture comes from Bedrock Edition

Credits to Jappa (The artist of the textures I modified) and Mojang!

Original textures
![Screenshot showing blocks from the pale garden with the default textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e395f1b04d5440ae5fcae48ca31bf5310c421e9c.png)

Modified textures
![Screenshot showing blocks from the pale garden with my tweaked textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eca419cc66295f5683caa767d0738ac73386612b.png)
